Okay, welcome back to module number five. We've been going at this now for a month and I hope that you guys are feeling excited, probably a little overwhelmed, which is totally cool. You guys are building a mass movement. You are helping change people's lives. If you're not feeling a little overwhelmed, you're probably not trying hard enough. So don't freak out if you are, it's totally cool. Now I'm excited because we're going to be jumping back to the expert's secret book now. And in this module, we're going through section number two, which is creating belief. Now it's interesting if you look at this, everything we've been doing up at this point is like, what are the funnels that get people? Like it's the marketing, traffic and funnels and people are now coming into our funnels and they're coming to us and now we're standing face to face with them. They land on your page and now it's like, now this is where you transition from the marketing side to more sales. How do we sell? How do we persuade? Sales is a word that most people don't like, but how do we persuade? How do we convince? How do we cause belief that what we are saying, what we're doing is true and that they need it to change their life? And that's what this is all about. And I'm so excited for this. This is one of my favorite things to talk about and to go deep into because I got started in this business, everyone talked about copywriting. And so I tried to learn how to become a copywriter. I studied all these things and they were good, but they were so technical and so it made me feel like I was dumb as I was going through it. Like, I can't do this because I'm not a gifted writer. I'm not like these kind of things. And it was really hard for me for, and honestly, probably seven or eight years I really struggled with copywriting. And but I was good with people. I was good at telling stories. I was good at these kind of things. And I thought they were different. And as I started understanding how they work together and how good copy is just good story. And if you understand good story structure, how easy it can be, it changed everything for me. And as I've now been able to coach thousands of entrepreneurs who aren't good copywriters, they can persuade, they can tell their story in a way that gets people to do what they need them to do and to believe what they need to believe. It's transformed things. So this section is copywriting in a way, but this is a way that hopefully will be freeing to you. It's all about creating belief. Now as you dive into here, there's basically, I believe five or six secrets here. And secret number one is the big domino. Like if you wanted to sell somebody something, you have to understand there's one thing, you have to get them to believe to get them to buy that thing. Like what is the one big domino? If you can convince them of that, they have to give you money. And that's the key. If you understand that and what that thing is, then everything you're selling ties around that big domino statement. A lot of times we go into sales and not really knowing what we're doing. We're shooting bullets out in the air, shooting shotguns, hoping where if you understand this is the belief that they have to believe. They believe this, they have to give you money. Then you can just zone it out like a sniper rifle and just shoot that one down. And that's the cool thing is helping you identify what is the big domino for your product, your service, your business. And then we start talking about the epiphany bridge. When you understand epiphany bridge, this is the key to everything in story and sales and understanding how to connect people emotionally as opposed to logically. So epiphany bridge, I can't wait for you to hear about that. Then we transition to the heroes two journeys. This is a concept I learned from my friend Michael Hague who's a screenwriter in Hollywood. He works with screenwriters in Hollywood to create movies that follow this process and this path he calls the heroes two journeys. You're going to walk through what that looks like and why every successful movie from the beginning of time all follows the same path. When you understand the pattern, what can we do with that? When you understand the pattern, now we can manipulate it and we can use it for what we need to. Then from there we talk about from the heroes two journeys to the epiphany bridge script which is based off the heroes two journeys. Then we go into false belief patterns. How we take the false belief patterns people have, how we crush those through story, talk about the three secrets and this is really going to help set up everything you need for next module. Next module we're going to be going into the actual presentation. Some of you guys will be a webinar and you have a webinar slide. Some of you guys will be on stage selling like this and you have PowerPoint slides or keynote slides. Some of you guys, it's going to be through video sales that are happening through phone or tell it. It doesn't matter how you're selling. These concepts in this module are the key foundational things you have to understand to persuade the masses to believe in something. After you master this, now next secret that we'll be focusing on next week is going to be taking those pieces and putting them into an actual presentation into PowerPoints or to what we call the perfect webinar. I hated calling it perfect webinar because it's more than that. It's not just for webinars but I've been calling that for a couple of years and it's kind of that term stuck in our community so we keep calling it that but it's the perfect presentation. To be able to create that, you have to understand belief and everything we talk about will be learning and mastering in this module. First thing I want to do is I'm actually going to show you guys a really quick video. It's a longer video and I want you to sit back and kind of watch it. It's a presentation I did at Funnel Hacking Live that's going to be going through this creating belief and I want you to understand we're going to go through kind of a higher level epiphany bridges and heroes two journeys and a whole bunch of these things. Watch that and just kind of sit back and relax. All those little pieces will have a video with assignment and explanations so you can come and do those.
